points.text: Fever is a common symptom of COVID-19 [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Cough is frequently reported in COVID-19 cases [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Loss of smell (anosmia) is a typical COVID-19 symptom [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Loss of taste (ageusia) often accompanies COVID-19 infection [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Fatigue is commonly experienced by COVID-19 patients [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Breathing difficulties can occur in COVID-19, especially in moderate to severe cases [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]
Congestion, runny nose, or sore throat (common cold symptoms) [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Headaches and body or muscle aches [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Digestive symptoms such as upset stomach, vomiting, or diarrhea [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002]
Fever is one of the most common COVID-19 symptoms [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Cough is a common COVID-19 symptom [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
Tiredness (fatigue) is a common COVID-19 symptom [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00001]
